name: Spaghetti Meat Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound sweet or hot Italian link sausage
1 pound round steak or stewing beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 large green pepper, seeded and chopped
2 16 oz cans Italian-style tomatoes, broken up
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove sausage from casings and brown in a skillet with ground chuck.
2. Break up the sausage and browned ground meat using a wooden spoon or fork.
3. Drain well. Add to Crock-Pot with remaining ingredients and stir thoroughly.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 16 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
5. For thicker sauce, cook on High for the last 2 hours, removing the cover for the final hour.
Note: This sauce may be made up to 2 days in advance and refrigerated. It also freezes well.
